hero.title: Chhaythean LY
hero.subtitle: Data Science student specializing in AI, backend systems, and DevOps — focused on building intelligent, scalable systems with clean architecture and high-performance code.

about.bio1: I’m a fourth-year Data Science student focused on Artificial Intelligence, backend development, and DevOps. I enjoy building intelligent systems and solving complex computational problems through clean, scalable architecture. My work emphasizes performance, maintainability, and continuous learning in modern software engineering.
about.bio2: When I’m not coding, I contribute to open-source and build experimental AI projects while exploring backend architectures and low-level tools to improve my efficiency and deepen my engineering skills.

projects.pageSubtitle: A selection of projects focused on AI, backend systems, and performance-driven engineering.

blog.pageSubtitle: Insights, experiments, and deep dives into AI, backend engineering, and system design.

footer.builtWith: Built with Nuxt 3, Tailwind CSS, and a focus on performance & clean architecture

items.description: Specialized in artificial intelligence and machine learning. Conducted research on natural language processing and advanced neural network architectures.
Built a strong foundation in software development, algorithms, and system design. Led multiple team projects and participated in coding competitions.
Graduated with honors, ranking in the top 5% of the class. Active in the computer science club and participated in national coding competitions.

experience.pageSubtitle: Professional journey and technical leadership across research, education, and mentoring.

items.role: Secretary, LLM Basic and Applied Research Club
items.description: Contributed to technical research in Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and Image Preprocessing. Studied the mathematical foundations of machine learning models, leading to improved training efficiency and model performance.
highlights: Enhanced the performance of a Gated Recurrent Unit (GRU) model, achieving a 15% increase in accuracy.
Organized and delivered technical seminars to share research insights with junior members.

items.organization: Institute of Technology of Cambodia, Kep Campus
items.description: Mentored undergraduate students in programming fundamentals and problem-solving strategies.
highlights: Delivered lectures on Advanced Calculus III and R programming, integrating LaTeX for technical documentation.

items.description: Volunteered as a mentor, leading the Junior Division at Tech for Kids Academy.
highlights: Taught Scratch programming (developed by MIT) to introduce computational thinking concepts.

items.description: Delivered mathematics training sessions in a private-sector education environment.
highlights: Recognized as an outstanding staff member for teaching effectiveness and student engagement.
Strengthened time management, communication, and instructional skills.

items.organization: Institute of Technology of Cambodia, Main Campus
items.description: Volunteered as a Mathematics Tutor for undergraduate students.
highlights: Taught Advanced Calculus I & II to first-year engineering students.
